title: Operating the Gassing Manifold
author: Roey Angel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vcue2ww
materials: Flip the switch to turn on the controller.

steps.title: Attach new needles to the syringe filters
steps.instruction: Attach new needles to the syringe filters. If working with sensitive samples, the syringe filters should also be changed to avoid contamination. The selected needles must be thick enough to penetrate the stoppers, but thin enough as to not break the stoppers.

steps.title: Attach the vials by piercing the...
steps.instruction: Attach the vials by piercing the stoppers with the attached needles. The needle should never touch the liquid inside the bottle!

steps.title: Turn on the main pressure knob...
steps.instruction: Turn on the main pressure knob almost all the way through. Never force the knob open or close beyond its stopping point!

steps.title: Turn on the pressure adjusting knob
steps.instruction: Turn on the pressure adjusting knob. Usually this is set to be between 0.5 and 1 bar. Never force the knob open or close beyond its stopping point! Whatever the pressure gauge shows will also be the level of overpressure in the vial!

steps.title: Open the valves of the tubes...
steps.instruction: Open the valves of the tubes to which vials were connected. Keep all other valvles closed.

steps.title: Wait and allow the vials to be flushed properly
steps.instruction: Wait and allow the vials to be flushed properly. The number of flushing cycles needed to turn the vials anoxic will depend on their content. Empty vials only need a about 3-5 cycles to become anoxic but vials with liquids will require longer to degas completely. This should be tested when using a new set-up of vials.

steps.title: Turn off the controller switch and...
steps.instruction: Turn off the controller switch and allow the vials to reach overpressure. What the pressure gauge above the controller shows is the overpressure in the vials

steps.title: Close the vavles and remove the vials
steps.instruction: Close the vavles and remove the vials.

steps.title: Turn off the main pressure knob
steps.instruction: Turn off the main pressure knob. Do not use excess force!

steps.title: Turn off the main pressure adjusting knob
steps.instruction: Turn off the main pressure adjusting knob. Do not use excess force!

steps.title: Release the remaining pressure in the...
steps.instruction: Release the remaining pressure in the system by quickly opening and closing one of the tube valves.
